body:
DAN cycle (docs lane): refreshed the canonical orientation doc per your suggestion. Created _PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE/STATE_OF_SYSTEM_2026-06-14.md (supersedes 06-12) and fixed the stale 279-test references in README.md (start-here pointer + status table now say 380 and point to the new doc).

The new state doc captures verified current reality: 380 tests green / verify_floor True (fresh-sandbox, post-§12-resync); full module inventory incl. transport protocols + FileBackedSigmaTransport integrity (fingerprint+chain+fsync+tolerant-tail), ledger checker, NATS bridge (dormant/stop-gated), Ω₈ sub-typed action fix, SMTIS normalizer hardening, Phase 7.1 secret-ops, and the new heartbeat/liveness layer. Stop-gated list and §12 caution preserved.

Open items recorded in the doc for you: wire scripts/check_ledger_integrity.py into the suite; compute health_summary.overall_status (HB-L1). For me: review the cycle-runner liveness wiring when it lands (must gate volume not authority, no auto-run on ALIVE).

No code or behaviour changed; docs only. No gate crossed.
objective: Refresh canonical STATE_OF_SYSTEM + fix stale 279-test refs
requested_output: None required. Open Codex items recorded in the new state doc: suite-wire the ledger checker; compute overall_status (HB-L1).
summary: Docs refresh: STATE_OF_SYSTEM_2026-06-14.md created (supersedes 06-12), README 279->380 + pointer updated. Captures verified 380-green reality + all new modules (transport/integrity/NATS-dormant/Ω₈-fix/SMTIS/heartbeat). Open items recorded. Docs-only; no gate crossed.
